data.title: Instantly AI: Step-by-Step Tutorial for Cold Email at Scale
data.excerpt: Learn how to set up Instantly AI for cold email outreach from scratch. This hands-on tutorial walks you through account warmup, sequence building, and scaling fast.

$media.alt: Instantly AI: Step-by-Step Tutorial for Cold Email at Scale

children.text: *Disclosure: This post contains affiliate links. If you sign up through them, I may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.*
I've tested a lot of cold email platforms over the past few years. Some are clunky. Some cap your sending volume. Some charge you per mailbox like you're renting apartments in Manhattan.
, and it changed how I think about outreach entirely.

Instantly is a cold email platform built for one thing: sending high-volume, personalized outreach without destroying your sender reputation. You connect unlimited email accounts, let the system warm them up automatically, and build AI-powered sequences that actually get replies.

This tutorial walks you through the entire setup process — from zero to your first campaign. Whether you're a solo founder doing outbound sales or an agency managing dozens of clients, you'll have a working system by the end.
What Makes Instantly Different From Other Email Tools
Before we jump into the steps, let me explain why Instantly stands out.

Most cold email tools charge per mailbox. That model punishes growth. If you want to send from 50 accounts to increase daily volume, you're paying 50 times. Instantly flips this. You connect as many email accounts as you want under one plan. No per-mailbox fees.

The platform also handles domain warmup natively. New domains and email accounts get gradually introduced to sending patterns that email providers trust. This means fewer spam folder landings and better deliverability from day one.
Then there's the AI layer. Instantly doesn't just send your emails — it helps you write them, personalize them at scale, and optimize based on what's actually working.

Here's a quick comparison that shows why I keep coming back to this tool. When I used other platforms, I spent hours manually rotating accounts and babysitting deliverability. With Instantly, those tasks run in the background while I focus on crafting better messages.
Want to see why so many outreach teams have switched?

Step 2: Connect and Warm Up Your Email Accounts

I currently run 30 accounts through Instantly. Setting up the 30th was just as easy as the first. No upgrade prompts, no "you've hit your limit" popups.

Instantly's warmup system works by sending and receiving emails between a network of real accounts. These emails get opened, replied to, marked as important, and moved out of spam when they land there. This builds your sender reputation organically.
: Start at 5–10 emails per day, then increase by 2–3 every few days.
: Keep it at 30–50% to simulate natural conversation patterns.
: Run warmup for at least 2–3 weeks before launching your first campaign.
The dashboard shows you a health score for each account. Green means you're good to send. Yellow means keep warming. Red means pause and investigate.
I've seen deliverability rates above 95% on accounts that went through a proper warmup cycle. That's the kind of number that makes outreach actually work.

The lead verification feature alone saves me hours each week. Instead of running lists through a separate tool, Instantly catches bounces before they happen.
Step 4: Create Your First Email Sequence

Instantly's AI writer helps you draft copy directly inside the sequence editor. You can:
Generate a full first draft from a brief description.

A typical sequence I run looks like this:
: Short, punchy intro. One clear question. No attachments.
(2 days later): Share a relevant insight or short case study.
(3 days later): A different angle — maybe a stat or a quick story.
(4 days later): Simple breakup email. "Should I close your file?"
Each email has 2–3 variations using spintax. Instantly rotates them automatically, so your sending pattern looks natural.
: I use 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Monday through Friday.
With 30 accounts at 40 emails each, that's 1,200 emails per day — all from one dashboard.
and Instantly takes over. It distributes sends across your accounts, respects your time windows, and rotates sequences. You get real-time analytics on opens, replies, and bounces.
Check out more use cases for Instantly here
New and Featured Functions Worth Knowing
Instantly ships updates frequently. Here are some standout features that make the platform even stronger:

Instantly can analyze a lead's LinkedIn profile or company website and auto-generate a personalized opening line for each email. This isn't generic mail-merge stuff — it reads like something a human wrote after 30 seconds of research.
The built-in CRM lets you track leads through pipeline stages without leaving Instantly. You can tag, filter, and move deals forward without switching tabs to a separate tool.

Instead of traditional A/B testing with two variants, Instantly lets you test multiple versions of subject lines, body copy, and CTAs simultaneously. The system automatically shifts volume toward the winners.
If you manage outreach for multiple clients, you can create isolated sub-accounts with separate billing, campaigns, and analytics. Each client gets their own sandbox.
A centralized view of your sending health across all accounts. It shows domain reputation trends, spam placement rates, and actionable recommendations to fix issues before they snowball.
Instantly works exceptionally well for specific types of users:

If you're bootstrapping and can't afford a sales team, Instantly lets you run professional-grade outreach from your laptop. Connect a few domains, warm them up over a weekend, and start booking calls the following week.
The unlimited mailbox model means your SDRs can each run multiple sending accounts without the finance team raising eyebrows. Volume scales linearly, not financially.
The sub-account structure, combined with unlimited connections, makes Instantly a natural fit for agencies running campaigns across many clients. You get clean separation and bulk efficiency.
I've talked to recruiters who use Instantly to reach passive candidates. The personalization AI and sequence builder work just as well for talent sourcing as they do for sales.
If you send cold emails regularly and you care about deliverability, Instantly deserves a spot in your stack.
Start your free trial with Instantly today

Does Instantly integrate with other tools?
Yes. Instantly connects with popular CRMs, Zapier, and webhooks. You can push lead data and campaign events into almost any workflow.
How many emails can I send per day?
That depends on how many accounts you connect and your per-account sending limits. With 20 accounts at 40 emails each, you're looking at 800 emails daily.
Instantly offers a trial so you can explore the platform before committing. Check their pricing page for the latest details on what's included.

children.text: How many email accounts can I connect to Instantly?
There is no limit on connected email accounts. You can add as many Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, or custom SMTP/IMAP accounts as you need under a single plan.
How long should I warm up new email accounts before sending campaigns?

I recommend warming up accounts for at least 2 to 3 weeks. Start with 5–10 warmup emails per day and gradually increase. Instantly's dashboard shows health scores so you know when each account is ready.
Can Instantly help me write cold email copy?

Yes. Instantly includes an AI-powered writer that generates email drafts, subject lines, and personalized opening lines based on your input. It also supports spintax for natural variation across sends.
